hero.headline: Connecting local humanitarian actors
hero.subheadline: ToGETHER Networking brings together local NGOs, partners and donors to maximize humanitarian impact in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

modules.label: THE PLATFORM
modules.title: All the tools you need
modules.subtitle: Six integrated modules to strengthen local humanitarian coordination in DRC
modules.card1_desc: Searchable directory of all verified local humanitarian organisations in DRC
modules.card2_desc: Calls for projects, grants and partnership opportunities centralised in one place
modules.card3_desc: Trainings, cluster meetings and provincial coordination forums
modules.card4_desc: Advocacy notes, impact reports and shared technical documents
modules.card5_desc: Real-time communication between NGOs by thematic group and province
modules.card6_desc: Real-time network indicators aligned with the ToGETHER Networking M&E framework

how_it_works.label: HOW IT WORKS
how_it_works.title: Simple, fast and effective
how_it_works.step1_desc: Create your profile in minutes and join the local humanitarian network
how_it_works.step2_desc: Access funding opportunities, events and other NGOs in your region
how_it_works.step3_desc: Track your projects, share your successes and strengthen your visibility

audience.partner_benefit1: Access to 247 verified and geolocated NGOs

stories.label: SUCCESS STORIES
stories.title: Concrete results on the ground
stories.quote1: Thanks to ToGETHER Networking, we secured €150,000 in funding in just 3 months
stories.quote2: 15 new partnerships established through the platform's inter-provincial network
stories.org2: Education Without Borders Network — North Kivu
stories.quote3: Coordination through the platform allowed us to intervene in 8 provinces simultaneously

cta.title: Ready to join the humanitarian network?
cta.subtitle: Join 247 organisations already collaborating on ToGETHER Networking. Free registration.
